params.name: Bowl of Troika
params.description: On that day, the three dogs swore brotherhood to Guan Yu under the peach tree. The pact was sealed with a deep kotow. From then on, they rode in the same vehicles, lived in the same lodging, and even ate out of the same bowl. What an unbreakable bond!
params.ss1:

Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
